sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Galenus</hi> Medicus [Gal.] <date TEIform="date">ii A.D.</date> Ed. C. G. Kühn, Leipzig 1821-33 (cited by vol. and p.); ed. H. Diels et alii, <title_ TEIform="title">CMG</title_> v 4 (2), 9 (1, 2), Leipzig 1918- (in pro- gress): the following works (cited by title) are separately edited in the editions named: <title_ TEIform="title">Anim.Pass.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ ψυχῆς παθῶν κτλ.,</foreign> ed. J. Marquardt, <title_ TEIform="title">Galeni Scripta Minora</title_> i p. 1, Leipzig (T.) 1884. <title_ TEIform="title">Consuet.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ ἐθῶν,</foreign> ed. I. Müller, <title_ TEIform="title">Scripta Minora</title_> (v. supr.) ii p. 9. <title_ TEIform="title">Inst.Log.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰσαγωγὴ διαλεκτική,</foreign> ed. C. Kalbfleisch, Leipzig (T.) 1896. <title_ TEIform="title">Libr.Ord.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τῆς τάξεως τῶν ἰδίων βιβλίων,</foreign> ed. I. Müller, </item>
